config.targetRepoPath: TARGET_REPO_PATH is required by the workbench adapter; agent(1) uses AGENT_REPO_ROOT internally.
config.apiConfigPath: API_CONFIG_PATH is used by the final program; agent(1) uses provider-specific env vars.

inputFormat.workbenchAdapter: RequirementDSL/current planning task plus project metadata

outputFormat.pythonRuntime: state JSON under agent_core/storage/states plus CLI summary
outputFormat.workbenchAdapter: dry-run plan, review summary, PR draft, artifacts JSON

doNotDirectlyIntegrate: raw storage states as production state
context-service backend as embedded source without dependency review
